text: We had an urgency and they gave us an appointment very quickly.

translations.sr: Imali smo hitnu situaciju i vrlo brzo su nam dali termin.
translations.sr_cyrl: Имали смо хитну ситуацију и врло брзо су нам дали термин.
translations.en: We had an urgency and they gave us an appointment very quickly.
translations.ru: У нас была срочная ситуация, и нам очень быстро назначили приём.
translations.de: Wir hatten einen Notfall und sie haben uns sehr schnell einen Termin gegeben.
translations.tr: Acil bir durumumuz vardı ve bize çok hızlı bir randevu verdiler.
